Container.Name: MKV-Orchestrator
Container.Overview: MKV Orchestrator is a media operations console for scanning MKV/MP4 files, reviewing media and track metadata, renaming files from TVDB/TMDB metadata, mux/remux planning, track property edits, and library overview workflows. The container includes MKVToolNix and FFmpeg/FFprobe. Mount your Unraid shares into /media and optionally /downloads; configure provider API keys in the web Settings page or through the optional masked environment variables below.

Config.Name: Media Path
Config.Description: Primary media library path mounted into the container.

Config.Name: Downloads Path
Config.Description: Optional downloads or staging path mounted into the container.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent MKVO settings, logs, and cache data.

Config.Name: ASPNETCORE_URLS
Config.Description: Internal ASP.NET listen URL. Leave unchanged unless you know you need a custom binding.

Config.Name: Media Root
Config.Description: Default root used by the Dashboard browser.

Config.Name: Source Roots
Config.Description: Additional named source roots. /media is added automatically; use name=/container/path entries separated by commas.

Config.Name: TVDB API Key
Config.Description: Optional TVDB API key. You can also enter this in MKVO Settings.

Config.Name: TVDB PIN
Config.Description: Optional TVDB subscriber PIN. You can also enter this in MKVO Settings.

Config.Name: TMDB API Key
Config.Description: Optional TMDB API key. You can also enter this in MKVO Settings.
